type_apto_cause: Fruit harvested at optimal time and handled with care.
type_apto_solution: Ready for packing and international shipping.
type_cascara_partida_cause: Sudden humidity changes or over-ripening on the plant.
type_cascara_partida_solution: Discard for export. Divert to by-products (puree).
type_cicatriz_golpe_cause: Poor handling during bunch transport or dropping.
type_cicatriz_golpe_solution: Check depth. If superficial, route to local market; if deep, discard.
type_corte_cuchareta_desc: Deep cut in the crown area.
type_corte_cuchareta_cause: Dull dehanding tool or human error during cutting.
type_corte_cuchareta_solution: Apply healing agent if minor, or re-cut crown if possible.
type_mal_formaciones_cause: Genetic factors or water stress during flowering.
type_mal_formaciones_solution: Not suitable for premium boxes. Sell as domestic fruit.
type_marca_madurez_solution: Separate immediately from the batch to prevent chain ripening.
type_plaga_enfermedades_cause: Mealybugs, Thrips, or lack of proper bagging.
type_plaga_enfermedades_solution: Immediate quarantine. Review phytosanitary control of the batch.
